title: niphobolus hastatus
intro: Niphobolus hastatus, also known as Polypodium hastatum, is a type of fern plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Niphobolus hastatus include treating various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems, as well as providing relief from fever and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can be dried or fresh to be used in various forms.
